title: Tax Structuring for Israeli Investors
notes_raw:
Topics: Optimal fund structure for Israeli institutional investors

Key points:
- Low-high vote REIT structure explored for Israeli institutional investors
- Cayman feeder is not the optimal structure for Israeli institutions
- Setup cost: $200–300K; ongoing: $50–100K/year
- Scale needed to justify: minimum $150–200M from Israeli investors
- Plan: Oscar to visit Israel in March/April to build LP pipeline

Action items: Work with Hillwood to get Israeli investor tax structure examples; consider Israel trip planning for March/April
